metadata.title: COMPOSITE FILLINGS - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.ogDescription: Composite (white) Fillings A composite (tooth colored or “white”) filling is used to repair a tooth that is affected by decay, cracks, fractures, etc.  The decayed or affected portion of the tooth will be removed and then filled with a composite filling. There are many types of filling materials available, each with their own advantages […]
